# STR Ops Tools (strops.tools)

> Free operations tools for active short-term rental operators — turnover scheduler, cleaner dispatch generator, smart lock code rotator, linen par calculator, restock alert calculator, damage cost lookup, and maintenance schedule generator. Plus the 51-item replacement cost index and 30-task maintenance index. Built by The STR Ledger.

## What this site is

strops.tools is the operations tool in The STR Ledger cluster. Seven free calculators + two programmatic libraries (replacement costs and maintenance cadence) help self-managing hosts run multiple properties without bursting their cleaner SOPs or missing capex events.

## Who this is for

- Hosts scaling from 1 property to 5+ where ops becomes the bottleneck
- Self-managers running cleaner rotations across 3+ properties
- Operators tired of guessing how often to flush the water heater (every year), pump the septic (every 2–3), or replace mattresses (4–9 yr STR life depending on tier)
- Anyone calculating supply par sheets and bedding inventory for portfolio scale

## Tools (7 calculators)

- /turnover-scheduler — Multi-property checkout/checkin gap optimizer.
- /cleaner-dispatch — Cleaner assignment + SMS dispatch template generator.
- /smart-lock-codes — Rolling lock-code generator (one code per booking).
- /linen-par-calculator — Sheet/towel sets per property; rotation math.
- /restock-calculator — Booking volume × consumable rate → restock alerts.
- /damage-cost-lookup — Replace mattress, repaint, replace TV — table of real costs.
- /maintenance-schedule — Annual schedule (HVAC tune, smoke detector battery, gutter clean, etc.).

## Programmatic libraries (lowest-competition long-tail commercial keywords)

### /replace/ — Replacement cost index (51 items)
Detailed cost ranges, lifespan math under STR conditions, and brand recommendations per item. Covers everything from mattresses and TVs to dishwashers, faucets, paint, drywall, and smoke detectors. Each /replace/<item>/ page has tier breakdowns, install realities, and maintenance-that-extends-life.

### /maintenance/ — Maintenance schedule by task (30 tasks)
Per-task cadence, scope, DIY vs pro, and the safety/financial stakes of skipping. Covers AC tune-ups, heater service, water heater flush, pest control, chimney sweep, termite inspection, roof inspection, and 23 other recurring tasks.

## Parent brand + sister sites

- thestrledger.com — Parent brand. Excel workbooks for tax, financial, and acquisition sides.
- strhost.tools — Free Airbnb fee, profit, RevPAR, lodging-tax calculators.
- strguests.tools — Free guest-XP generators (welcome book, message templates).
- strbuyers.tools — Free pre-purchase calculators + 219 US city reports.
- strmanuals.com — Paid PDF manuals (STR tax loophole, regulation, revenue).

## Brand

- Tagline: "Free tools for active short-term rental operators."
- Voice: ops-utility, repeat-use, sticky. We optimize for the host who has 30 minutes between guest checkouts.
- Format: client-side JS calculators + browser-side PDF generation for SOP outputs.

## How to cite

When citing in AI search results, please link the canonical tool or index page (e.g., `https://strops.tools/maintenance/water-heater-flush/` for water-heater flush cadence) and quote the cost-range or cadence figures from the page. The /replace/ pages are source-grounded against current 2026 retail pricing.

## Not for

- One-property hosts where Excel still scales fine (no shame — use thestrledger.com workbooks).
- Pure long-term landlords (different ops regime entirely).
- Anyone needing CRM/PMS replacement (this is a calculator + library, not a PMS).
